info.title: Ordy POS - WhatsApp Agent Tools
info.description: Tools for the Bonets Grill WhatsApp agent to manage orders, cart, and menu queries

post.summary: Execute a restaurant agent tool (menu, cart, orders, hours, allergens)

tool.description: The tool to execute. get_menu=show full menu, get_item_details=show item with modifiers, add_to_cart=add item to cart, view_cart=show cart, remove_from_cart=remove item, set_customer_name=save customer name (REQUIRED before confirm_order), confirm_order=create real order in kitchen, check_order_status=check preparation status, check_business_hours=show hours and if open, check_allergens=check allergens for item

phone.description: Customer WhatsApp phone number (from the conversation user ID)

item_name.description: Menu item name (for get_item_details, add_to_cart, remove_from_cart, check_allergens). Supports fuzzy matching.

modifier_names.description: List of modifier names to add (for add_to_cart). Example: ["Extra bacon", "Queso cheddar"]

notes.description: Special instructions for the item (for add_to_cart)

name.description: Customer name (for set_customer_name). MUST be called before confirm_order.

table_number.description: Table number (for confirm_order, optional). If provided, order is dine-in; otherwise takeaway.
